title: senecio juniperinus
intro: Senecio juniperinus, also known as the juniper groundsel, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its grayish-green foliage and clusters of small, yellow flowers. The plant contains toxic compounds called pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio juniperinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, although it should be used with caution due to its toxicity. Herbal preparations of Senecio juniperinus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any products derived from this plant.
